page: Amazon Web Services c5d.12xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores from an Intel Xeon 8275CL processor running at 3.6 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 35 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and AVX-512 VNNI. The instance is equipped with 96.0 GB of DDR4 memory operating at 3 GHz, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

For local high-speed storage, the c5d.12xlarge includes 1800 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes. This local storage is bundled directly with the instance, offering high-speed read and write capabilities suitable for scratch space or caching. Networking performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps, facilitating steady data transfer rates.

Benchmark data indicates average performance across compute and memory metrics. The instance achieved a PassMark CPU score of 39,050.61 and a multi-core Geekbench score of 12,270.0. Its memory subsystem demonstrated strong performance in PassMark memory tests, with a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 2,619.36 GB/sec. In database operations, the instance processed 41.07 million Redis SET operations per second. These characteristics make the c5d.12xlarge well-suited for compute-intensive workloads, batch processing, distributed analytics, and high-performance web serving.
description: Amazon Web Services c5d.12xlarge is a compute-optimized instance utilizing the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8275CL processor with 48 vCPUs, 24 physical cores, and a clock speed of 3.6 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 96.0 GB of DDR4 memory and 1800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, providing high-speed local data access. With a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps, the instance delivers balanced throughput. Performance benchmarks show average multi-core CPU capabilities, with a PassMark CPU score of 39,050.61, and strong memory performance, highlighted by a PassMark memory score of 2,767.33. The c5d.12xlarge is designed for compute-heavy workloads, database operations, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c5d.12xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 48 vCPUs, 96 GB of DDR4 RAM, and 1800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, designed for high-performance database and compute workloads.

tagline: A compute-optimized platform featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high-speed local NVMe storage for intensive data processing.

96.0 GB of DDR4 memory with 2.0 GB per core allocation
1800 GB of integrated local NVMe SSD storage
